name: meeting-role-motion-ui

checklist.summary: User replied `continue`, confirming the checklist and asking to proceed.

tested.summary: User replied `可以了，我验收通过了，关闭吧`, confirming the implemented meeting role motion behavior passed acceptance.

done.summary: User asked to close the requirement after acceptance, confirming the requirement is complete.

notes: Product clarification completed before review: goals are current-speaker recognition plus active meeting atmosphere; nod means listening, not agreement.
Checklist must be confirmed before todolist creation.
User replied `go`; execution plan created and implementation started.
Verification used local service on port 8100 as requested. Automated checks passed except phase5, which failed due to missing local gateway advisory dependency.
Added explicit turn-head cue after user feedback: listeners now show a short horizontal turn motion when facing changes.
8100 verification is now running through start.sh with real data directory /home/wo/code/my-virtual-office/data.
Chrome MCP could not start because the environment has no X server; adjusted animation amplitudes based on user feedback and restarted start.sh so browser cache version refreshes.
Speaker vertical bob frequency restored to original 0.22 tick multiplier per user feedback while keeping improved visibility.
Speaker vertical bob amplitude reduced to 0.8px per user feedback; 8100 service was restarted through start.sh with real data and returned the updated game.js.
User confirmed acceptance and requested closure.
